input.content: Pursuant to our policy, notwithstanding prior agreements, please complete all required fields herein within 24 hours.

assumptions: Automated analysis — human review recommended for sensitive contexts

findings: Legal/technical jargon detected: pursuant, notwithstanding, herein
recommendations: Replace jargon with plain language equivalents
Test content with users who have varied cognitive profiles
Provide a summary at the top for users who cannot read the full content
